title: Hardcore Night Vision Goggles
description: Goggles with limited night vision and an on/off key bind
body:
###### [Click here for Basic version of this mod!](https://modrinth.com/mod/basic-night-vision-goggles)

# [Hardcore Night Vision Goggles!](https://modrinth.com/mod/hardcore-night-vision-goggles)

- Durability goes down when goggles are equipped and night vision is active

- Durability last 30 minutes uninterrupted

- Default toggle key "V"

- Use F3+H or **[Durability Tooltip](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/durability-tooltip)** to see in game durability

- 1.20.1 Requires **[Curios API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios)**

- 1.21.1 Requires **[Adorned (Curios)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/adorned)**

![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39c63525d56dd652a12e9a0fcdf3fea4181b57fe.gif)

- Goggles with any damage can be repaired with 2 Redstone Dust and 1 Amethyst Shard in a Crafting Table

![Repair recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33c6e19d35b02a92e027e5c5d216aef972ec9540.gif)

<details>
<summary>Newest Update!</summary>

Version 1.1.0 has added colorful Night Vision Goggles

![nvg colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1df073b54ad956ccc3364f409e4682966a3fefc6.png)

Gray texture is displayed when any NVG runs out of durability

![depletednvg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af49087530f71aafe81b2a75423529ad48aa9880_0.webp)

</details>
